texto: The spirit of mathematics is not captured by spending 3 hours solving 20 look-alike homework problems. Mathematics is thinking, comparing, analyzing, inventing, and understanding. The main point is not quantity or speed—the main point is quality of thought.The spirit of mathematics is not captured by spending 3 hours solving 20 look-alike homework problems. Mathematics is thinking, comparing, analyzing, inventing, and understanding. The main point is not quantity or speed—the main point is quality of thought.
explicacao: Citação de Jane Gilman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The spirit of mathematics is not captured by spending 3 hours solving 20 look-alike homework prob…” articula reflexao, mathematics, point em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
